title: Madras HC seeks IT Dept response to plea alleging discrepancies in BJP leader Tamilisai Soundararajan's poll affidavit
description: The Madras High Court on Monday issued notice on a plea alleging discrepancies in an election affidavit filed by Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) leader Tamilisai Soundararajan, a candidate in the Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly elections, 2026 [Goutam Siva Vs Election Commission of India].The plea has been filed by a voter who has raised concerns about alleged discrepancies noticed with respect to Soundararajan's disclosed income. A Bench of Chief Justice SA Dharmadikari and Arul Murugan sought res
